items.title: Fit selection inside the training pipeline
items.avoid: Calling `fit` on `SelectKBest` or RFE using concatenated train+test matrices.
items.prefer: Use `sklearn.pipeline.Pipeline` so scaling, imputation, and selection run only on each training fold.
items.why: Prevents target leakage and makes cross-validated scores reflect production behavior.

items.title: Match method to budget and goal
items.avoid: Running full RFE on 50k features without a filter pre-step.
items.prefer: Filter to a manageable pool (variance threshold, top MI), then RFE or L1 on hundreds—not tens of thousands—of columns.
items.why: Wrappers retrain the model many times; naive search does not scale to ultra-wide data.
items.example: Keep top 500 by MI, then `RFECV` with step=10 on a linear SVM base estimator.

items.title: Validate with the same metric you ship
items.avoid: Choosing k features by training accuracy alone.
items.prefer: Pick subset size or λ using cross-validated ROC-AUC, RMSE, or business metric on held-out folds.
items.why: Training fit can improve as you add noise features; generalization metrics reveal overfitting.
items.example: `RFECV` with `scoring='roc_auc'` for imbalanced classification instead of default accuracy.
